prompt: Minimalist commercial ad featuring oversized white perfume bottle, ultra-clean design. A young woman in all-white outfit leans casually against the giant bottle, relaxed confident pose, eyes closed, holding the same perfume bottle in her hand. Soft gradient blue background with large bold white “CHANEL” text behind. Glossy reflective floor, soft studio lighting, modern high-end fashion/product photography. Small top-right text “Designed by Mr Das”. Bottom center tagline in small white font: “Elegance in every drop.”
